text: {"claims":[{"statement":"We conducted 22 focus group discussions (FGDs) and 24 key informant interviews (KIIs) among 178 people from February 1 to 8, 2021.","claimType":"empirical","quote":"In total, we conducted 22 FGDs and 24 KIIs among 178 people from February 1 to 8, 2021.","entailment":"The quoted sentence directly reports the number of FGDs, KIIs, the total participants, and the dates of data collection, which substantiates the claim.","population":"178 people","intervention":"","comparator":"","outcome":"22 FGDs and 24 KIIs","timeframe":"February 1 to 8, 2021","quantifiers":"","modality":"descriptive"},{"statement":"All interviews (FGDs and KIIs) lasted between 45 and 60 minutes after obtaining verbal consent.","claimType":"empirical","quote":"After obtaining verbal consent, all interviews (FGDs and KIIs) lasted between 45 and 60 min.","entailment":"The quote specifies the duration range of the interviews following consent, supporting the claim about interview length.","population":"","intervention":"","comparator":"","outcome":"interview duration 45-60 minutes","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"descriptive"},{"statement":"Data collection teams followed COVID-19 preventive guidelines such as masking, hand washing with soap and water, and maintaining 2 m distance between each other before and during the interviews.","claimType":"empirical","quote":"Data collection teams followed all COVID-19 preventive guidelines such as masking, hand washing with soap and water, and maintaining 2 m distance between each other before and during the interviews.","entailment":"The quoted sentence lists the specific COVID-19 preventive measures adhered to by the data collection teams, confirming the claim.","population":"","intervention":"","comparator":"","outcome":"adherence to COVID-19 preventive guidelines","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"descriptive"},{"statement":"The study obtained ethics approval from the National Health Research Ethics Committee of Nigeria and the Johns Hopkins University Institutional Review Board.","claimType":"empirical","quote":"We obtained ethics approval for the study from the National Health Research Ethics Committee of Nigeria (NHREC/01/01/2007-05/11/2020) and the Johns Hopkins University Institutional Review Board (IRB00014705).","entailment":"The quote explicitly names the two ethics committees that granted approval, supporting the claim about ethics approval.","population":"","intervention":"","comparator":"","outcome":"ethics approval obtained","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"descriptive"}]}
